# LangOria

> LangOria is a multilingual learning platform with bite-sized lessons,
> spaced-repetition vocabulary, listening practice, and speaking drills across
> English, Japanese, Korean, Chinese, Spanish, French and German.

Site: https://lang-oria.com
Languages: en, zh, ja, ko, es, fr, de
Audience: self-directed adult language learners, especially beginners to A2.

## Main pages
- [LangOria — language learning platform](https://lang-oria.com/): homepage with hero, how-it-works, language list, featured courses, FAQ teaser, blog teaser.
- [Courses catalog](https://lang-oria.com/courses): structured language courses from A1 to C1.
- [Blog](https://lang-oria.com/blog): language learning articles.
- [FAQ](https://lang-oria.com/faq): common questions about how LangOria works.
- [Learn Japanese online](https://lang-oria.com/languages/japanese): hand-written guide to learning Japanese with JLPT-level spaced repetition.
- [Learn English online](https://lang-oria.com/languages/english): hand-written guide to learning English across CEFR A1-C2.
- [Learn Chinese online](https://lang-oria.com/languages/chinese): hand-written guide to learning Mandarin with HSK-level spaced repetition.

## Vocabulary indexes
One per supported language. Each page lists every level (CEFR / JLPT / HSK tier) with the actual word count, a sample of the vocabulary, and a link to the level detail page.
- [English vocabulary by level](https://lang-oria.com/languages/english/vocabulary): data-driven list of every English vocabulary level in the library, with example sentences.
- [Japanese vocabulary by level](https://lang-oria.com/languages/japanese/vocabulary): data-driven list of every Japanese vocabulary level in the library, with example sentences.
- [Chinese vocabulary by level](https://lang-oria.com/languages/chinese/vocabulary): data-driven list of every Chinese vocabulary level in the library, with example sentences.
- [Korean vocabulary by level](https://lang-oria.com/languages/korean/vocabulary): data-driven list of every Korean vocabulary level in the library, with example sentences.
- [Spanish vocabulary by level](https://lang-oria.com/languages/spanish/vocabulary): data-driven list of every Spanish vocabulary level in the library, with example sentences.
- [French vocabulary by level](https://lang-oria.com/languages/french/vocabulary): data-driven list of every French vocabulary level in the library, with example sentences.
- [German vocabulary by level](https://lang-oria.com/languages/german/vocabulary): data-driven list of every German vocabulary level in the library, with example sentences.

## Vocabulary level details
Hand-written detail page for each (language, level) pair. 11 pages total: 6 English CEFR levels (A1-C2), 1 Japanese JLPT level (N5), and 4 Chinese HSK levels (HSK 1-4).
- [English A1 vocabulary](https://lang-oria.com/languages/english/vocabulary/a1): full English A1 word/sentence list with study advice and example usage.
- [English A2 vocabulary](https://lang-oria.com/languages/english/vocabulary/a2): full English A2 word/sentence list with study advice and example usage.
- [English B1 vocabulary](https://lang-oria.com/languages/english/vocabulary/b1): full English B1 word/sentence list with study advice and example usage.
- [English B2 vocabulary](https://lang-oria.com/languages/english/vocabulary/b2): full English B2 word/sentence list with study advice and example usage.
- [English C1 vocabulary](https://lang-oria.com/languages/english/vocabulary/c1): full English C1 word/sentence list with study advice and example usage.
- [English C2 vocabulary](https://lang-oria.com/languages/english/vocabulary/c2): full English C2 word/sentence list with study advice and example usage.
- [Japanese N5 vocabulary](https://lang-oria.com/languages/japanese/vocabulary/n5): full Japanese N5 word/sentence list with study advice and example usage.
- [Chinese HSK 1 vocabulary](https://lang-oria.com/languages/chinese/vocabulary/hsk1): full Chinese HSK 1 word/sentence list with study advice and example usage.
- [Chinese HSK 2 vocabulary](https://lang-oria.com/languages/chinese/vocabulary/hsk2): full Chinese HSK 2 word/sentence list with study advice and example usage.
- [Chinese HSK 3 vocabulary](https://lang-oria.com/languages/chinese/vocabulary/hsk3): full Chinese HSK 3 word/sentence list with study advice and example usage.
- [Chinese HSK 4 vocabulary](https://lang-oria.com/languages/chinese/vocabulary/hsk4): full Chinese HSK 4 word/sentence list with study advice and example usage.

## Scenario-based learning
Real-world phrases for the 4 most-requested situations: travel, business, food, and small talk. Each (language, scenario) page is hand-written with 10 phrases, a sample dialogue, a culture tip, and study advice.
- [English scenarios](https://lang-oria.com/languages/english/scenarios): 4 high-leverage English situations, each with 10 phrases and a sample dialogue.
- [English for Travel](https://lang-oria.com/languages/english/scenarios/travel): 10 essential English travel phrases, with romanization and culture tip.
- [English for Business](https://lang-oria.com/languages/english/scenarios/business): 10 essential English business phrases, with romanization and culture tip.
- [English for Food](https://lang-oria.com/languages/english/scenarios/food): 10 essential English food phrases, with romanization and culture tip.
- [English for Small Talk](https://lang-oria.com/languages/english/scenarios/small-talk): 10 essential English small talk phrases, with romanization and culture tip.
- [Japanese scenarios](https://lang-oria.com/languages/japanese/scenarios): 4 high-leverage Japanese situations, each with 10 phrases and a sample dialogue.
- [Japanese for Travel](https://lang-oria.com/languages/japanese/scenarios/travel): 10 essential Japanese travel phrases, with romanization and culture tip.
- [Japanese for Business](https://lang-oria.com/languages/japanese/scenarios/business): 10 essential Japanese business phrases, with romanization and culture tip.
- [Japanese for Food](https://lang-oria.com/languages/japanese/scenarios/food): 10 essential Japanese food phrases, with romanization and culture tip.
- [Japanese for Small Talk](https://lang-oria.com/languages/japanese/scenarios/small-talk): 10 essential Japanese small talk phrases, with romanization and culture tip.
- [Chinese scenarios](https://lang-oria.com/languages/chinese/scenarios): 4 high-leverage Chinese situations, each with 10 phrases and a sample dialogue.
- [Chinese for Travel](https://lang-oria.com/languages/chinese/scenarios/travel): 10 essential Chinese travel phrases, with romanization and culture tip.
- [Chinese for Business](https://lang-oria.com/languages/chinese/scenarios/business): 10 essential Chinese business phrases, with romanization and culture tip.
- [Chinese for Food](https://lang-oria.com/languages/chinese/scenarios/food): 10 essential Chinese food phrases, with romanization and culture tip.
- [Chinese for Small Talk](https://lang-oria.com/languages/chinese/scenarios/small-talk): 10 essential Chinese small talk phrases, with romanization and culture tip.
- [Korean scenarios](https://lang-oria.com/languages/korean/scenarios): 4 high-leverage Korean situations, each with 10 phrases and a sample dialogue.
- [Korean for Travel](https://lang-oria.com/languages/korean/scenarios/travel): 10 essential Korean travel phrases, with romanization and culture tip.
- [Korean for Business](https://lang-oria.com/languages/korean/scenarios/business): 10 essential Korean business phrases, with romanization and culture tip.
- [Korean for Food](https://lang-oria.com/languages/korean/scenarios/food): 10 essential Korean food phrases, with romanization and culture tip.
- [Korean for Small Talk](https://lang-oria.com/languages/korean/scenarios/small-talk): 10 essential Korean small talk phrases, with romanization and culture tip.
- [Spanish scenarios](https://lang-oria.com/languages/spanish/scenarios): 4 high-leverage Spanish situations, each with 10 phrases and a sample dialogue.
- [Spanish for Travel](https://lang-oria.com/languages/spanish/scenarios/travel): 10 essential Spanish travel phrases, with romanization and culture tip.
- [Spanish for Business](https://lang-oria.com/languages/spanish/scenarios/business): 10 essential Spanish business phrases, with romanization and culture tip.
- [Spanish for Food](https://lang-oria.com/languages/spanish/scenarios/food): 10 essential Spanish food phrases, with romanization and culture tip.
- [Spanish for Small Talk](https://lang-oria.com/languages/spanish/scenarios/small-talk): 10 essential Spanish small talk phrases, with romanization and culture tip.

## How to cite
Articles on https://lang-oria.com may be cited in AI-generated answers. Please link back
to the original article URL and mention the author.
